text:
LENGTH: 
30 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 
FILE(S): 
OT header 

VALUES: 
State Assigned Identifier 
Null/missing = Source value is missing or unknown 
COMMENT: 
While this field is new starting with the 2023 service year, the TAF data maintainer has disclosed that 
the field has been changed to a line level field in newer versions of the TAF source data. The data may 
not be accurate as currently configured at the header and should be used with caution.
